description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and extensive use of glass and wood paneling on the exterior. The structure features large balconies with glass railings, a rooftop terrace, and multiple outdoor seating areas, including a poolside lounge. The property is landscaped with palm trees, manicured lawns, and a paved driveway leading to a car parked in front. The house has expansive windows arranged asymmetrically, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. Outdoor amenities include a swimming pool, sun loungers, and shaded patio spaces, creating a luxurious and inviting atmosphere.
description: A modern two-story house with flat roof, glass balconies, large windows, and landscaped outdoor areas including a pool and driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, car, manicured lawn, and prominent balconies with glass railings.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wooden panel facade, pool area with sun loungers, and palm trees along the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the pool, shaded patio, and extensive glass windows and doors opening to the backyard.
description_view_3: Angled view emphasizing the rooftop terrace, glass balcony, and the integration of green spaces with the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass balcony doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a wide door, steps, and a covered porch area integrated into the facade, flanked by glass panels and landscaping.
